name: Team Hunt
subject: Let's flip it back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

The past few months have proven once and for all that Washington is broken. Instead of working on the issues that matter most to middle-class families in districts like ours, Democrats have focused on partisan political games.

If we want things to change, we need to send new leaders to Washington with the strength and resolve to stand up to the establishment and actually get things done. We need Members of Congress who will actually work to secure our borders, fix our infrastructure and protect our energy jobs. We need to elect leaders like Wesley.

And our fight starts in neighborhoods like yours, Friend.

That's why we're writing to you this evening. We're less than 40 days away from the Primary Election and we need your help to get Wesley's message out to your friends, neighbors and family members. You can sign up today to...

[1\. Block-walk in your neighborhood!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=82ea6f99cbbc4566a834a7a5114d1c41&_e=f8vJYJa4YXwLUArWs-iIbN9c8rytHQja6UMyjmsyJutPE0nZ4DrsFL5I_g6_lmwbjTZljANIxZk19TNabjs3s-uo0eXMJOpDziTXHfPpQwHOULF4Xa5HbPb03LCrF4mgQ4IJPhfBOgord2yBtG5K2hvmz6BN-etZiAQS4kraOwKKm4jCh630Ezr_yTv20U6oGnnerJRrOU3IEbj4cg02hxzu8wG1Wi2e41-qEj9zPxp4_lT8xqlTxIxPFMk9x3nt3vjDwg3WFYRQFdUyorYQvA%3D%3D)

[3\. Host or help us organize a Neighborhood Meet & Greet in your area!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=82ea6f99cbbc4566a834a7a5114d1c41&_e=f8vJYJa4YXwLUArWs-iIbN9c8rytHQja6UMyjmsyJutPE0nZ4DrsFL5I_g6_lmwbAsxFMlMduhca7Nv6dzugM0jbGI0UzFQjisW4D2tOH-jYxsMfuePp9rD3QILK5wR3rsfW3jiV04uDOH8NcxjQ3yDVda7CqX8RhiE2gTHR-ZVP1p0r8fJ8meH1VK5e3s-L5-LiEar_O2EFkQR2r7LOpIbKG5u-UdS_eMzuH2kXuBG3G8zKJ0kdt3DycBA0DRNGYKuiuaYeb3hoYMQtyTvFvg%3D%3D)

We need your help to elect Wesley, a leader who will stand up for the values we share and the Houston we love!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The dishonest impeachment case
body:
Today marks the end of House Democrats’ 3-day presentation of their historically weak Articles of Impeachment against President Trump | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca17c288fa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **The dishonest impeachment case**

**Today marks the end **of House Democrats’ 3-day presentation of their historically weak Articles of Impeachment against President Trump. Starting tomorrow, the President will have a chance to respond to Democrats’ dishonest case.

**As expected, the media** is going the extra mile to prop up Rep. Adam Schiff’s (D-CA) performance this week. Their hope, much like Schiff’s argument itself, is that if you repeat a lie enough, people might soon forget you don’t have any actual evidence for it.

**MUST WATCH** : [Caught! ABC anchor tries to cut off the President’s counsel ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c1a6596ea&e=3ee4985eea)

**That strategy** was on full display in today’s finale. Schiff spent long portions of his presentation lecturing Senators on the importance of U.S. security aid to Ukraine, claiming that President Trump undermined it. The truth, of course, is that President Trump is the one who secured that lethal defense aid for Ukraine in the first place, reversing the Obama Administration’s policy of weak support.

**It gets better**. Guess who voted _against_ authorizing the assistance for Ukraine? House Democrats’ own impeachment managers. Rep. Jerry Nadler (D-NY) voted no on the FY2020 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), which included $300 million for Ukraine. Nadler joined Rep. Zoe Lofgren (D-CA) and Rep. Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) in voting against the FY2019 NDAA, as well, with its $250 million for Ukraine.

**Unfortunately, this behavior** is par for the course for Democrats in Washington lately. Their obsession with attacking President Trump has led to all sorts of outright lies over the past 3 years, many of which the media simply declined to fact-check:

* Beginning in 2017, Schiff **_lied_** **_multiple times_** that he had seen evidence of collusion between President Trump and Russia. Of course, the Mueller Report exposed that as a leftwing hoax—so Schiff just moved on to Ukraine.

* Also in 2017, Schiff tried to **_repeatedly mislead the public_** on the credibility of the debunked Steele dossier. In 2018, he issued a memo to Republicans stating that the FBI and Justice Department didn’t abuse the surveillance process to spy on the Trump campaign. That is now a [**_proven falsehood_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7e6527b27&e=3ee4985eea).

* Chasing another hoax, Schiff tried to obtain compromising photos of the President that **_never even existed_**. He was duped by Russian pranksters.

* It was discovered that Schiff’s team **_coordinated with the whistleblower_** at the center of the Ukraine allegations before the complaint was ever even filed. Schiff had previously lied that there was no contact with the whistleblower.

**That’s just a small sample** of some of the worst lies from _one_ Democrat impeachment manager. But no matter how many things they make up, the facts of the case won’t change: President Trump is not accused of a corrupt action or of breaking the law. He is under attack by avowed political enemies on the subjective basis of motive and intent because they disagree with his policies.

**Think about** that as a precedent.

[“‘Dazzling’: Adam Schiff's history of inaccuracies, conspiracy theories follows him to Senate floor”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e127d2021&e=3ee4985eea)

**Shameless:** [“Adam Schiff Refers to Russia Over 30 Times During Senate Impeachment Hearing”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1a1b484a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **What President Trump told the 47 th March for Life **

**President Trump made history** today, becoming the first President to join thousands of Americans at the annual March for Life rally in Washington. Here are a few important things he told the crowd:

* When it comes to abortion, Democrats have embraced the most radical and extreme positions.

* Unborn children have never had a stronger defender in the White House.

* Every life brings love into this world. Every child brings joy to a family. Every person is worth protecting.

* Young people are the heart of the March for Life—and it is your generation that is making America a Pro-Family, Pro-Life Nation!

[READ: Thousands of Americans are marching to defend the unborn—and the President stands with them.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57ec286807&e=3ee4985eea)

**Pro-life Americans:**** President Trump** ["has pursued policies we’ve dreamt of"](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=029ae07f4d&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/pro-lifers-trump-has-delivered")
---
|
---
|

---
|
---

| **President Trump delivers remarks at the 47th Annual March for Life gathering **| January 24, 2020
---

subject: Rachel Maddow tears into senators for sleeping and leaving the Senate trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | MSNBC host Rachel Maddow chastised senators unable to stay awake, focus, or otherwise be present for the impeachment trials. She called on them to set a better example of civic duty, take their jobs seriously, and listen to the case being presented before them. Republicans aren't listening, though. Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have repeatedly not taken the trial seriously, dismissing it before it began. They do TV interviews while the trial is in session and have flaunted their bias toward the president. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: They're after YOU, not me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body: Peter, Little Adam Schiff simply can't stop LYING. He already got caught making up a FAKE PHONE call that he said I had with Ukraine. Now he's been caught in yet ANOTHER LIE while trying to push his bogus impeachment SHAM. It seems that he is much more interested in landing more interviews for himself on CNN and MSNBC than he is in making sure the American people know the TRUTH. This Fake Impeachment has been a SCAM from the very beginning, and the American people aren't buying it. name: Dan Rowe, Powered By People
subject: Today, tomorrow, and Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Eliz Markowitz’ runoff in Texas House District 28 is on Tuesday, and we’re really putting the pedal to the metal during this home stretch.
Hi, I'm Dan — an organizer on the Powered By People team.
Eliz Markowitz' **runoff in Texas House District 28 is on Tuesday** , and we're really putting the pedal to the metal during this home stretch. Hundreds of volunteers are hitting the pavement to talk to (and turn out) voters. But we also need help contacting all the people we've been unable to get a hold of so far.
**That's where you come in. Even though you're in Florida, you have a critical role to play in this election.**
**[That's why I'm asking you to sign up and join our remote call team to make sure in-district voters have a plan for Election Day — and more specifically, a plan to vote for Eliz!](http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=1&akid=77957%2E444211%2EFaaQCU)**
**[Join the call team>>](http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=2&akid=77957%2E444211%2EFaaQCU)**
This is a monumental race — not just for Texas, but for our country. And the conversations we have with voters in these final few days have the potential to turn the tide for Eliz.
I hope you'll be able to make it this weekend. [And if you can't, please consider making a donation to fund our critical voter turnout work in Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42148?refcode=ema20200125-77957&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=77957%2E444211%2EFaaQCU)
Dan Rowe
Powered By People

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=77957%2E444211%2EFaaQCU).

name: Megan West
subject: Yesterday was historic!
body:
| | Peter, For the first time in history, a sitting President attended and addressed the 47th annual March for Life in Washington, D.C. An estimated 500,000 people marched yesterday. It wasn’t a protest, it was a march _for_ life. President Trump’s opening remarks to the crowd ignited excitement; “It is my profound honor to be the first president in history to attend the March for Life!” He shared boldly, “Every life brings love into this world. Every child brings joy to a family. Every person is worth protecting. And above all, we know that every human soul is divine and every human life, born and unborn, is made in the holy image of Almighty God!” He also declared, “Unborn children have never had a stronger defender in the White House.” President Trump has gone to great lengths to defend the sanctity of life. **Consider some of President Trump’s pro-life accomplishments in just over three years:**
* Appointed two Supreme Court Justices to uphold the inalienable right to life.
* Signed a bill allowing states to defund Planned Parenthood of Title X funds.
* Stopped funding abortions overseas by reinstating the Mexico City Policy and expanding it to the new Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance program which now protects over $8.8 billion of overseas aid from going to fund abortions.
* Ended taxpayer-funded contracts experimentation with aborted baby body parts.
* Reduced Planned Parenthood’s taxpayer funding by $60 million through the Protect Life Rule.
* Implemented new rules regarding the HHS Mandate to allow exemptions for religious beliefs or moral objections against providing contraceptives or abortion-inducing.

[And the list goes on](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=7GFcsLrIRBUfBvv6WvQCmHe6Rmx2zgHdQSE7BVNKz8KqjukvGhuawujyqOYz-7is&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200125com01&n=1)! The March for Life has taken place every year since the U.S. Supreme Court ruled on Roe v. Wade in 1974, legalizing abortion. But there is no denying that the march this year was special because of the President's participation. We were there and I can tell you that the energy was electric! There were people who had traveled from all over the country to participate. There were a lot of young people - you would have been encouraged by their enthusiasm and commitment to stand for life. We put together a [time-lapse video](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPsvm5BnoHPZpBQ0XdJm407MNr8lqnCeUTyxftAjpMBlA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200125com01&n=2) to get a glimpse at just how many people were in attendance. [I hope you will check it out](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPsvm5BnoHPZpBQ0XdJm407MNr8lqnCeUTyxftAjpMBlA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200125com01&n=3) and be encouraged; you do not stand alone. There are millions of other people just like you who believe every human life is to be valued and plan to vote accordingly. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPsvm5BnoHPZpBQ0XdJm407MNr8lqnCeUTyxftAjpMBlA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200125com01&n=4) Stand for life, Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200125com01&n=5)

name: End Dark Money (via NikkiFosterOH.com)
subject: Corporations have more say than we do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce92/30a4f917/5083cb8a/28ceb59e/3055426747/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1&source=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1")

| | Since the Supreme Court's Citizens United decision, dark money's outsized and corrupting influence on our elections has gotten much worse. Since the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision, **dark money 's outsized and corrupting influence on our elections has gotten much worse.** A democracy designed to be steered by "We the People" now gives more deference to those with the biggest pockets than everyday Americans. **All it took to buy Republican Steve Chabot 's vote against lowering drug prices for struggling Americans was for Big Pharma to funnel $136,524 into his re-election funds.** We deserve representatives who cannot be bought. [**Until we pass sweeping legislation protecting our elections from undue influence, all representatives should pledge to disavow corporate PAC money. Add your name if you agree ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce92/30a4f917/5083cb8a/28ceb591/3055426747/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Until+we+pass+sweeping+legislation+prote&utm_campaign=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1&source=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1") | | | [Add your name ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce92/30a4f917/5083cb8a/28ceb590/3055426747/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1&source=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1")
---
**Our system breaks when it prioritizes special interests over working families** \-- that's why Nikki is rejecting corporate PAC money and committing to fight for us, not wealthy corporate mega-donors.
Let's make sure Nikki makes it to Washington,
Team Nikki

|
---
| If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce92/30a4f917/5083cb8a/28ceb593/3055426747/VEsC/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_footer_ab&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1&source=NFK_EM_EN_200125_DarkMoney_U2_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Top 5 Reasons YOU Should Attend Congress of Counties
body:
Plans for next weekend? Here are the TOP FIVE reasons why your plans should include attending Congress of Counties, our two-day training and... |
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9745075a5c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Top 5 Reasons YOU Should Attend Congress of Counties Next Weekend!**
---
| Plans for next weekend? Here are the **TOP FIVE reasons why your plans should include attending Congress of Counties** , our [two-day training and networking conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aa84e8425f&e=1acd9bb3d6) for our full Republican team.
[**\-- > Register Now! <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=21ef4f7bb3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Whether you're running for office (now or in the future), working on a local campaign or party team, involved in election administration, or just thinking about getting involved...this is a fun event for you!
---
|
---
| **1\. Network with your fellow Republicans!** _Republicans from across the state will be joining us for Congress of Counties. This is a great opportunity for you to meet new people, and make new Republican friends and allies! _ **2\. Meet Governor Eric Holcomb & Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch!** _Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch will both be at Congress of Counties! On Friday night you'll have the chance to talk with them and even get a photo! If that's not enough, Governor Holcomb will be back Saturday to speak during lunch!_
**3\. Build the skills to win in 2020 and beyond!** _Running for office or working on a campaign are not easy tasks. We're here to help! Your Indiana Republican Party team will be hosting breakout sessions on all of the important skills and information you need to know for all things campaigns!_ **4\. Get trained on the latest campaign technology! ** _Technology is a crucial part of campaigns in today. Don't miss out! We'll train you and teach you everything you need to know about all of the latest campaign technology and the best apps to use! _ **5\. Have a great time!** _Not only will you get to do all of the things above, but we'll make sure you have a great time along the way! With fellow Republicans from across the state, Governor Holcomb, breakout sessions, and food, there's no way you can go wrong!_
---
|
---
| Don't miss out! [Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fce90eb493&e=1acd9bb3d6)**** before it's too late! And if you can't make it for the full weekend, we also [have registration options](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ba4a93c656&e=1acd9bb3d6) that include just the Friday night reception or the Saturday lunch.

We hope to see you there! [**\-- > Register Now! <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0ef9f30017&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e61229a31c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb6510b2bf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e777c371c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Undecided swing voters will determine Trump's future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: A new poll shows Trump trailing "A Democrat" by 4.9% in Ohio, 12.9% in Michigan, 9.8% in Pennsylvania, and 13.4% in Wisconsin. But between 15.6% and 19.3% of voters in each of those states are undecided. And millions of voters stayed home in 2016, handing Trump the election. name: J.D.  Scholten
subject: Add your name to support working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

We have a serious poverty crisis in our country. As the rich get richer, working families are working twice as hard but still struggle to get by. Folks are facing stagnant wages and dwindling opportunities. Food, child care, health care, transportation, and housing costs are all going up.

Benefits and social services that help working families are constantly on the chopping block by politicians in Washington, hoping to cut spending without angering their special interest donors.

What these disconnected politicians ignore is the deep impact these programs have on folks across the country, especially right here in Iowa, but also on our entire economy. From food stamps to Medicaid to federal housing assistance, these programs help regular folks keep food on the table, stay healthy, or protect them from losing their home. They also lift folks out of poverty, aid productivity, and inject more dollars into the hands of folks who will spend it out in the community.

One of the most crucial of these programs is the Earned Income Tax Credit. This tax refund gives working families, especially those with children, a few extra dollars to get by with. Last year alone, it lifted 5.6 million people -- including about 3 million kids -- out of poverty. Most folks use the EITC to pay for necessities, for instance to repair their home, fix their truck to get to work, or get additional training or education to further their career and earning potential.

**[On Earned Income Tax Credit awareness day, sign our campaign’s petition demanding Congress protect the EITC in all budget negotiations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284298/149550925/342862701?ms=em20_200125_eitcpt&refcode=em20_200125_eitcpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284299/149550926/342862701?ms=em20_200125_eitcpt&refcode=em20_200125_eitcpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) Before running for office, I had the privilege of working for Working Hero -- an organization focused on lifting people out of poverty. Learning how the system works, I realized just how easy it is for our government to stack the odds against farmers, waitresses, teachers, garbage collectors -- the people who make our society work.

We need to make sure every person who qualifies for the Earned Income Tax Credit takes advantage of it -- this isn’t just the right thing to do, it’s good economic sense.

**A family with two working parents should not struggle to make ends meet to feed their kids.** As the tariffs threaten farms and local manufacturing here in Iowa, we should be strengthening the systems that help working folks get ahead, not holding them back.

We need members of Congress who stand with poor and middle class folks instead of big donors. We need representatives who will hear their needs and concerns and fight to end poverty.

**[Add your name -- tell Congress to stand by the poor and working families who rely on the Earned Income Tax Credit.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284300/149550927/342862701?ms=em20_200125_eitcpt&refcode=em20_200125_eitcpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284301/149550928/342862701?ms=em20_200125_eitcpt&refcode=em20_200125_eitcpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284302/149550929/-52674191?refcode=em20_200125_eitcpt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284303/149550930/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14284304/149550931/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&emci=997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/997b150e-f03e-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/72de6a62-ae3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRlNmE2Mi1hZTNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hP96uZlgIwzMOFqaOChkFgYrG82icqpZD2oFw3NAMHA=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're not on track to meet our very first monthly fundraising deadline of 2020. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom5?refcode=em200125-eom5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks...

**Here's the bad news:** We're not on track to meet our very first monthly fundraising deadline of 2020. We're about 647 donations behind to be exact.

With people like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and shadowy players like the Koch network looking for any sign of weakness in our campaign, it's critical we reach this goal. Trump thinks Minnesota is ripe for the taking (_that's why his campaign is prepared to spend up to $30 MILLION to win_) and we can't prove him right.

**Now, here's the good news:** If enough people step up with a grassroots donation, we'll get back on track before the deadline, and muster the necessary resources to take on Trump, and protect Minnesota's Democratic Senate seat.

**It really is that simple, folks. So, will you pitch in $10 (or more!) now to help us build a winning campaign here in Minnesota? Your donation will send a strong message to Trump and the GOP mega-donors plowing millions into our elections.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom5?refcode=em200125-eom5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Void where prohibited and outside 50 US and DC/PR/USVI. Open to legal residents of 50 US and DC/PR/USVI, age 18+ (19+ in NE and AL; 21+ in MS) at entry. Begins 12:00 p.m. ET on 1/23/20; ends 3:00 p.m. ET on 1/25/20. To enter, fill out the web form at with your personal information and a brief explanation of why you support Mike Bloomberg for President in 2020 (300 words max.). 100 entries will be chosen at random, and judged on creativity and enthusiasm, and 1 winner will be selected; plus 4 runners up. One (1) Grand Prize: Travel to and accommodations in NYC for 2 people from 1/28-29/20. Meals and ground transportation at origin city not included. Four (4) runner-up prizes: Bloomberg 2020 Campaign merchandise. Total ARV of each Grand Prize: $2,000; ARV of each runner-up prize: $22,50; ARV of all prizes: $2,090. body:
Today in Austin, MJ will take the stage for one of the first major primary debates of the Texas Senate race.

|

Today's the day, Peter!

Today in Austin, MJ will take the stage for one of the first major debates of the Texas Senate race. It's a big opportunity for MJ to show all of Texas why she's the best candidate to take on and _defeat_ Sen. Cornyn, and you won't want to miss it!

**Earlier this week we set a goal of bringing 3,500 new donors* on board before the debate starts. Thanks to this grassroots team, we've earned contributions from 2,982 new donors so far and we're SO CLOSE to hitting our goal! [Will you rush a donation right now to help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904c8/7f51f7bc/4ab762ad/4ef07d48/2382977787/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200125.1nd__815__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904c8/7f51f7bc/4ab762ad/4ef07d48/2382977787/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200125.1nd__815__&amount=10&recurring=true")
After tonight, there are only 24 days until the start of early voting. And there are still a lot of undecided Texans out there that we need to reach! But unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs -- which means we're counting on your grassroots support to fuel this campaign.

**We 'd LOVE to tell MJ that we hit 3,500 new donors before the debate begins -- she'll be thrilled to know she has so much support in her corner going into the debate! So will you rush a donation now to help us reach our goal before MJ takes the stage?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Team MJ

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Why I can beat Anthony Brindisi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Unlike other politicians, I’ve actually delivered for the people of Upstate New York. | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=713661ba7c314ec3ac43fe5cdd97b12d&_e=WZmn4WtmbSNiJxSwlzM_Q3LXjxNNzI_8wR7WzTS9LBTQp4U42jW4JMZnyU5ICMu8By9M9VWucxKpptppi6gYHMXUMH96Lwi5vhyK2dK4ILASj7CA9oa67TPnlRrHFcIe9j5eHXgqHAt-0db5uuF4ayIgZtkUwF_kjIJwfeK5JAvrogohx-IJYUJOxm9Sr9Jsrou4QS_zef83PcWtIixz1xuRWiRgs3tXlcecYgBrP7dZtzA1CFH5L4hxVAxD2K49trQBb24hrAqPpt-ZFq3Sc-phbHmGxhMrLXetdr19pNTDvxsk1RorDiKOFSOUfMKM1nT1W6hjnzBZ8uqa6XRWFa9ynhX1xlIe1DB7hSTNeM8TdbEPZx7iGqzHwvKQUaVtJf7A8HvTHx5zASbYKzavW0vxmo6godvMq0L1y_AyqA3PZ3fI6kuk5Nw9a_mwd-VBheVGQtVHhWECH-f2PcJyCw%3D%3D)
|
---
**Peter, some politicians promise a lot but deliver nothing. I’m not one of them.**

During my time in Congress, I fought tirelessly for the hardworking families, small business owners and family farmers in Upstate New York.

I worked with President Trump to deliver historic tax reform, reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, increase funding to the Air Force Research Lab and other defense assets and so much more.

But now, Anthony Brindisi and Democrats in Congress are trying to undo all this hard work.

**That’s why I need you to join my fight to put Upstate New York first. Add your name below:**
[ **Put Upstate New York first!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=713661ba7c314ec3ac43fe5cdd97b12d&_e=WZmn4WtmbSNiJxSwlzM_Q3LXjxNNzI_8wR7WzTS9LBTQp4U42jW4JMZnyU5ICMu8By9M9VWucxKpptppi6gYHMXUMH96Lwi5vhyK2dK4ILASj7CA9oa67TPnlRrHFcIe9j5eHXgqHAt-0db5uuF4ayIgZtkUwF_kjIJwfeK5JAvrogohx-IJYUJOxm9Sr9Jsrou4QS_zef83PcWtIixz1xuRWiRgs3tXlcecYgBrP7dZtzA1CFH5L4hxVAxD2K49Q0g1MCA_0swyKlWBQds4Jnm20Yv6qnzKoIFOH46PSflwvcdhzd8OvgfcDk82OcQ3bjwuwoyn4DRr55u-AzFZPS3I7h7XlvmfWJnOCy-_0xAbt2FHN0-sQjlqdc_5OV7Uune4eP1bnJNFrGLEKJOtA06tU4KJxsG7uheNWO0wmD32Z7Tv6kfwWeYkhQx3OI2eVdGGmJ6MKZcLeKKVOepe9g%3D%3D)
Anthony Brindisi has continuously lied to the people in our district. He promised not to vote for impeachment, but then voted for it three times and called it “the most important vote” he’s ever taken.

While Brindisi, Nancy Pelosi, and Adam Schiff have carried out this baseless witch hunt, Anthony Brindisi has failed to deliver anything for the people of New York’s 22nd Congressional District.

**[Help me put Upstate New York first and deliver real results for the people of our district. Join my campaign now!>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=713661ba7c314ec3ac43fe5cdd97b12d&_e=WZmn4WtmbSNiJxSwlzM_Q3LXjxNNzI_8wR7WzTS9LBTQp4U42jW4JMZnyU5ICMu8By9M9VWucxKpptppi6gYHMXUMH96Lwi5vhyK2dK4ILASj7CA9oa67TPnlRrHFcIe9j5eHXgqHAt-0db5uuF4ayIgZtkUwF_kjIJwfeK5JAvrogohx-IJYUJOxm9Sr9Jsrou4QS_zef83PcWtIixz1xuRWiRgs3tXlcecYgBrP7dZtzA1CFH5L4hxVAxD2K49gxKp4zFNM3VqkMfuYqyPAyqobLzpkSAXf1CaL3j721a0mTmjge9i1vwTQAs87UwEHVG04dMQ60g82g-DsZ66TAs9MZ5LZ5a4jmRf1BXeoq0KTP47bvO1SQjhtsGX5kARDxU0joCyGha3gYrwtqGmn-G1tm9W1e0mW-UGDSJ1x7tzeWxm3DQKIGmx5bShlQLSoLaz7r4TZVFb61GdiZrCAA%3D%3D)**

Peter, with your help, we can defeat Anthony Brindisi in November and send someone to Washington who has a track record of delivering for the people she represents.

Thanks for your support,

Claudia Tenney
---

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: what’s on your mind, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
This past week, we held our campaign’s second town hall meeting in York, where I was excited to hear from people in the community about the issues that matter most to them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14285603/149567148/1171673536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc5OGJhYS1iNjNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93i4AGHCvt1ZKCdgFlzNJ-QysINqTNawTH3aE5grcI4=&emci=819a5c8f-8c3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=b7798baa-b63f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249) Team,

This past week, we held our campaign’s second town hall meeting in York, where I was excited to hear from people in the community about the issues that matter most to them. I’m so grateful whenever I have the opportunity to hear directly from people in the district and respond to the things that are weighing on their mind.

One of my biggest concerns with our current representation in Washington is the lack of effort to actually meet with the people of this district. **Team, Scott Perry wants to represent an extreme ideology. I’m running to represent the district and _everyone_ in it. **

[**To do that, I want to make sure I’m taking every opportunity to hear directly from you. I know not everyone can make it to these events and town hall meetings, so if you weren’t able to join us last week, will you consider letting me know what’s on your mind?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14285604/149567149/1171673536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc5OGJhYS1iNjNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93i4AGHCvt1ZKCdgFlzNJ-QysINqTNawTH3aE5grcI4=&emci=819a5c8f-8c3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=b7798baa-b63f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249) | [Submit a question »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14285605/149567150/1171673536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc5OGJhYS1iNjNmLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93i4AGHCvt1ZKCdgFlzNJ-QysINqTNawTH3aE5grcI4=&emci=819a5c8f-8c3f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=b7798baa-b63f-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249)

clean_body: This past week, we held our campaign’s second town hall meeting in York, where I was excited to hear from people in the community about the issues that matter most to them. Team, This past week, we held our campaign’s second town hall meeting in York, where I was excited to hear from people in the community about the issues that matter most to them. I’m so grateful whenever I have the opportunity to hear directly from people in the district and respond to the things that are weighing on their mind. One of my biggest concerns with our current representation in Washington is the lack of effort to actually meet with the people of this district. Team, Scott Perry wants to represent an extreme ideology. I’m running to represent the district and everyone in it. | Your stories and insights are invaluable to me in this election, and I will fight every day to make sure I’m representing your best interests in Congress. McCarthy has told more lies to protect the president than we can count. So far, he’s called the impeachment proceedings:
\- "A national nightmare"
\- "Rigged"
\- A "last attempt to stop the Trump presidency"
**And claimed that the FBI broke into Trump’s campaign headquarters -- even though there’s no proof of that.** His behavior isn’t just ridiculous -- it’s endangering our democracy by setting the precedent that crimes shouldn’t be punished if the president commits them.

name: John Kasich
subject: It's a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c9797c6f5c841c5ab37ef4cca7d6103&_e=L1dnA2GoCJ5JEcsKIM1DQxizalS21afEo-sbTX5Ncd_fXhctFVYXErJ4-F2NrhnON3G1mJtLnA0T1qPzWxGqNuAij-97AtxCUcAAkO9JHskiAhMFQ5LhAIpguAnUip0uozwSHsQGKKmyNgq0AYqRz3ksYy7izOK0YXpFJUJ8gozLY8VS0ifHsN6V8odpYx0nz0IEn61ZkSE7hjzr9no3gguUlbxJwCnGOA1aKS2c8hFdEs1ut8q70f25SV0Hi5ctdkTEx8SsreLsutcf7R-UWg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - we have seen the partisanship and division in Washington on full display this week during the Senate impeachment trial.

Since I left Congress in 2001, I’ve seen America drifting into unbelievable partisanship and it’s affecting our ability to address so many vital issues and high priorities that could receive bipartisan support. While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation.

It is my mission to continue being a leading voice calling for each of us to do what we can to embrace the power of positive change from the ground up. It really is up to us to fix America.

I do have one ask of you today. The funds we raise into this organization go right back into helping us spread this message as far and wide as we can. If you'd like to chip in to support this message and help meet our January fundraising goal, [please consider making a generous contribution here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c9797c6f5c841c5ab37ef4cca7d6103&_e=L1dnA2GoCJ5JEcsKIM1DQ3ctlyjfvmyGYF4wJR0lvIKTjTqQFeKXomf4je3Tiudww_ju6c674hf3-NwkgW8FIVSPCoQq91YjfiToNEDkIxdfwwCt_j2HOdiwRcaXGQQConAUpw-7K4_OrG8mJ-r82mjioLatLC42HYYKfzRBgA6sv34LrbdylO0tEsV5gtAgaZ7L5ME-ykWnf10vSrZeB55AYxJu71eDrkghkqI51vLAtQ-yQIuXweTRetKaqqNNOLwrgp5TDjx5XEr5oWgZTA%3D%3D).

clean_body: While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation. | | Peter - we have seen the partisanship and division in Washington on full display this week during the Senate impeachment trial. Since I left Congress in 2001, I’ve seen America drifting into unbelievable partisanship and it’s affecting our ability to address so many vital issues and high priorities that could receive bipartisan support. While we’re seeing partisanship reflected today with the impeachment trial, this climate has profound negative implications for our nation. It is my mission to continue being a leading voice calling for each of us to do what we can to embrace the power of positive change from the ground up. It really is up to us to fix America. I do have one ask of you today. The funds we raise into this organization go right back into helping us spread this message as far and wide as we can. If you'd like to chip in to support this message and help meet our January fundraising goal, . Thank you for all that you're doing! -John | View some of Gov. Kasich's recent interviews on: \-- \-- | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

body:
Time is running out

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a7/7dfbb003/42a48e3a/5527cf08/495589840/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Friend, I wish I was emailing you today to talk about my platform, why I am running for Congress, my career experiences, or sharing a proud moment about my family. But I'm not writing about any of those things today. I am writing because my campaign needs your help, now more than ever. We have been staffing up and talking to voters as much as we can, but unfortunately these things cost a lot of money. We are only 38 days away from the pivotal primary Election in North Carolina and we are coming up short of our January goal. [To keep this campaign moving we need to raise another $16,000 before January 31st. Is there any way you can chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can so we can keep this campaign moving?](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a7/7dfbb003/42a48e3a/5527cf09/495589840/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a7/7dfbb003/42a48e3a/5527cf0e/495589840/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5")

With Appreciation,
Monika Johnson-Hostler
Democratic Candidate for Congress, NC-02
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. With less than 10 days until the Iowa caucuses, our organizers, volunteers, and supporters are working harder than ever to win Iowa for Elizabeth.

We're making sure that every person who's committed to caucus for Elizabeth has a plan to get it done, knocking on every door and having important conversations with voters about why they should support Elizabeth, and reaching as many communities as possible.

We're leaving it all on the field and taking nothing for granted -- because this is the most important election of our lifetimes, and we're doing everything we can to send Elizabeth to the White House.

But all of these efforts are 100% grassroots funded -- and right now we need a surge of support to continue reaching enough Iowans to win. That's why we need your support.

**[Can you chip in $2 to help grow our organizing program during this critical moment?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0da/45c30650/1e19ba9ed/66e12082/1048959018/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xWkZfRUdSX0dSTV9DXzIwMjAwMTI1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1ZF_EGR_GRM_C_20200125_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

And as we ramp up our organizing in these final days, we need to make sure that we have the resources to continue our program all the way to victory.

But all of these efforts are 100% grassroots funded -- and right now we need a surge of support to continue reaching enough Iowans to win. That's why we need your support. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" There's no doubt about it -- we're running the strongest organizing operation in the state, and our ground game is how we're going to win Iowa. And as we ramp up our organizing in these final days, we need to make sure that we have the resources to continue our program all the way to victory. That's why we're asking for your help -- because it's more important than ever that our supporters pitch in to ensure that we have the funds we need to win. "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: "Sen. Collins has 'not really' seen anything that's 'stuck out to her' so far in Pres. Trump's impeachment trial"
body:
We can't believe this.

Friends, can you believe this headline?
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ecf/4bef7a87/6ab4fc6f/287f8b1d/564488417/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200125-full")
So far during the trial, we've heard about White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney giving a press conference where he basically admitted Trump's defenses were a lie.
We heard about a text from a top American diplomat that said it was "crazy" to withhold aid to Ukraine for political reasons.
And Lev Parnas gave an explosive interview where he claimed Donald Trump knew about the "quid pro quo" in Ukraine the whole time.
But _nothing_ has "stuck out to her?"
**Susan Collins isn 't trying to get all the facts or be transparent with the American people. She's trying to sweep this scandal under the rug -- and we've had enough.**
[**Fight back with a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign to defeat Susan Collins.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ecf/4bef7a87/6ab4fc6f/287f8b1d/564488417/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200125-full")

Together, we will elect a Senator we can trust to put truth before politics and partisan loyalty.
Keep fighting,
Team Sara

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | MSNBC host Rachel Maddow chastised senators unable to stay awake, focus, or otherwise be present for the impeachment trials. She called on them to set a better example of civic duty, take their jobs seriously, and listen to the case being presented before them. Republicans aren't listening, though. Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have repeatedly not taken the trial seriously, dismissing it before it began. They do TV interviews while the trial is in session and have flaunted their bias toward the president. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
President’s Legal Team Lays Out Defense Against Impeachment | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8df39be711&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**President’s Legal Team Lays Out Defense Against Impeachment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a7f4d897c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Turnabout is fair play — and now it’s President Trump’s turn. Trump’s impeachment defense came out with rhetorical guns blazing Saturday – accusing the House Democrats’ impeachment managers of hiding evidence from the senators,” Mary Kay Linge reports. “Today we are going to confront them on the merits of their argument,” White House Counsel Pat Cipollone said.

“They have the burden of proof and they have not come close to meeting it.”

**Must-read:** [“‘Dazzling’: Adam Schiff's history of inaccuracies, conspiracy theories”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a17b8a73cb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Schumer Whiffs Impeachment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0988581e4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
It’s been a tough week for Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY). “In fairness, Mr. Schumer was handed the weakest impeachment case in U.S. history. He began this exercise facing 53 Republican senators who spent months watching the most liberal House Democrats use secret hearings, leaked transcripts and strong-arm tactics to produce two vague and legally dubious articles of impeachment,” Kimberly Strassel writes.

**Trial ratings plummet:** [**"Impeachment trial gets lower ratings than _Jeopardy!_ on a bad night"**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e905966796&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/impeachment-trial-gets-lower-ratings-than-jeopardy-on-a-bad-night")
---
|
---
| [**Trump Sets New Standard for Pro-Life Presidents in Address to March for Life**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84c20eda65&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“President Donald Trump became the first president to attend the March for Life rally in its 47th year on the National Mall on Friday,” Tristan Justice reports. “At the demonstration, Trump made clear his commitment to pro-life values while hundreds of protestors carried signs declaring Trump the most pro-life president in history.”

** President Trump:** [We will defend the rights of every child, born and unborn](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4e98e9556&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Newt Gingrich: Trump Triumphs at World Economic Forum While Democrats Pursue Baseless Impeachment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de500708c1&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump’s visit to the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland this week was a bigger triumph than anyone could possibly have imagined a year ago,” former House Speaker Newt Gingrich writes. “The counter-staging of President Trump landing at Davos while the Senate began the trial over his phony impeachment was a Reagan-quality move . . . President Trump gave an important, principled speech that was worthy of the leader of the biggest economy and most powerful military in the world.”

**🎬** [In Davos, President Trump showed how America is winning again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8584892f49&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**VP Mike Pence Meets Pope Francis in Private Audience at Vatican**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd722a2e00&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Vice President Mike Pence met with Pope Francis at the Vatican on Friday, discussing the anti-abortion march in Washington,” Frances D'Emilio reports. “The pope and the vice president had a private hour-long conversation. Pence was beaming after the meeting, which appeared to be particularly cordial.” The Vice President also lauded President Trump as the “most pro-life president in American history.”

** Watch: **[Vice President Pence and Second Lady travel to Italy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78ff256702&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=610dcfa6ed&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e55eb2c0d9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c2e78ae124)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Opinion Research Team
subject: Quick survey for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi team,

subject: we have ALL the momentum heading into November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
It’s official — Governor Holcomb is on the ballot in 2020 thanks to the efforts of Hoosiers across the state | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuABw9Nh--8ugg2Zx8N1_qnOnv6JgM6wXJ7Bbci7J0p7WNGc0Msm0qbPHO26a1vFPcrapceNwIltkTp7zmXtNbz_9T8PtobjCNOoWOpLEPnFEqEU7dnbtOjwKRd6wPxD2Ay_UdgyJ3AJDZLce4IRT29_LQr1qjt9mODY8crJgZuZS5z-MO9tC0bHfZ_ZsQLZ83cC7rYah3qAMOKhYf9mSqzQ8xZXv_pZlOuC_hNxNAL6wTRPM0AqAvwU-wjDpwiI9I12F6esiGeLQ9osQoqQVDOSw_jxHLm3yqOXql9BwndI27Fwl4nqKM0cCiI8UCBeEYloN06m0byBCPUwEjgWDDDw18hHtwSn8yQQ_bNeGMPGI%3D) |
---|---|---
_**BREAKING: GOVERNOR HOLCOMB OFFICIALLY ON THE 2020 BALLOT**_
[ **Help us keep up our momentum** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuABw9Nh--8ugg2Zx8N1_qnOnv6JgM6wXJ7Bbci7J0p7WNGc0Msm0qbPHO26a1vFPcrapceNwIltkTp7zmXtNbz_9T8PtobjCNOoWOpLEPnFEqEU7dnbtOjwKRd6wPxD2Ay_UdgyJ3AJDZLce4IRT29zbIpgTdvUIStKua2T4swM4ZhR5L0b1cPzs-SYsxTfdXla0lD5k6d2xqITJaaOkjiwL3CBc6Hhx8mam6pWfs4m5u1iCPf-d42gssQmdE0c6oIk0IIsSP4pPKQX2Bi08hIUdsCP1A3EGfcA9hm2DA1to8Ucmzi124kxut59RFBwF-qdtsxSgwUopiWEjJSBp4EW9eBZiXWz-FPXxWydTPI2o%3D)
Friend,

It’s official — Governor Holcomb is on the ballot in 2020 thanks to the efforts of Hoosiers across the state!

We filed with the Indiana Secretary of State after collecting more than 9,000 petition signatures **(more than double the required amount)** in ALL 92 of Indiana’s counties. It’s incredibly exciting to be part of a movement that’s energized, mobilized, and organized heading into November.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuABw9Nh--8ugg2Zx8N1_qnOnv6JgM6wXJ7Bbci7J0p7WNGc0Msm0qbPHO26a1vFPcrapceNwIltkTp7zmXtNbz_9T8PtobjCNOoWOpLEPnFEqEU7dnbtOjwKRd6wPxD2Ay_UdgyJ3AJDZLce4IRT294Le-Lh8cll41T6wXow_anbL4XKZEXz45Go8zJKRSBGkLzyPpul8dMWXB9GSsgQJyptdtLvy72sLUctzVHHGDbH4Vc1bAxs3Z3xGs4Gw6yKSmkNrxiK5zu-daOZj7dShPCg9GGkwjWtB13QUxckzI08QmQkuTaYz2qd89a7I_QxD6c4Ih0mWC8UObDFstYkFPix1Zq3usTgdSfW10J6CjHc%3D)
But we can’t stop now. To quote Governor Holcomb, “Indiana is on a roll and we’re not taking our foot off the gas.”

[**Friend , will you help us keep our foot on the gas by chipping in any amount today? **](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuABw9Nh--8ugg2Zx8N1_qnOnv6JgM6wXJ7Bbci7J0p7WNGc0Msm0qbPHO26a1vFPcrapceNwIltkTp7zmXtNbz_9T8PtobjCNOoWOpLEPnFEqEU7dnbtOjwKRd6wPxD2Ay_UdgyJ3AJDZLce4IRT296R89TXxfqblw271Pw7rqa8gVnZtTOegtCr3uSQB_luCScwBQ6u8OwiIDTM_q5eAAEFwZPoEOwV-jcc88e2QcwZxl-5cdwwE0ZbrI8kLfhNp_DJ2Qco1xpl3MnBtDdGvdmd3tMggjqfRcvcsEFDVLhv8ZaQqr9gh176tx_MJPLA_HnGx1PPeUpWAFy2M2AVUzzoHNTekMO-sIkavetXqLsQ%3D)
[ **Chip in any amount** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuySRId2oGm0mtSmEmBb67cwUQosMGHh9ycxRTKeLUT59B9_DZ20TUvEnCCj3-5O8BnkfOfL_BmHdxIQJ2666cGHgWp3zJNYsA0UTGVUtzi-VpxEppQ5PZuYU_AaXNr97BIFAPASdTurAPFChJAW0wGu3hq3V2cabWKNd_dSEwZiB98momHndTFpj0b8xbxfeiaGwmV3OyaBsqhFDEUL99cUWe-oKVH4PQ0t6jz1xlStSKkPAsEDnq-RE-YvCJpHGWQlJeBMvFmYQcv3rtKnVc53_Do9wCTQGXhxycPD9__qFuChacYEV6Gl51spR_i8GQa289w_jyBn1wRb87W9lgb5HYN9j4IMC8L1NsPx0bCrg%3D)
Governor Holcomb’s dedication and commitment to Putting People First has brought together Hoosiers from every corner of the state. We’ve accomplished a lot together over the last four years, and we couldn’t be more excited about what we will accomplish over the next four.

[**If you want to join us in Putting People First for another four years, please chip in any amount — >** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cd88b679de814771b6f5460fa9f0e529&_e=vrTKN6agaOppHo3ch6A4JXy4V8WmhSBR57WBB0kWIP-GeCTHoCT7bmm8l_XPoNSuABw9Nh--8ugg2Zx8N1_qnOnv6JgM6wXJ7Bbci7J0p7WNGc0Msm0qbPHO26a1vFPcrapceNwIltkTp7zmXtNbz_9T8PtobjCNOoWOpLEPnFEqEU7dnbtOjwKRd6wPxD2Ay_UdgyJ3AJDZLce4IRT292QcpXzNVrwGCOvPx5bPmzsJ9Fpnzu21MlC5pFDLrsHV_HCZg3qB5L87zKkdt5grKtIzySqmatus4QfmYVKO0ND2xRj6rqF0YDIzZKDoQK2tao8WVTWZLWiCZV3wCezoAyHNFjRkMKDYrAf9bW8OYPuTCJpfhR14oNGk5o15-TdNicorcWoVkyBvPrIQ-vPzs0wPqgdwRjeDS41o2ZQ4zsY%3D)

Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: ☎️ talk with Iowa caucus-goers right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Making calls to Iowa caucus-goers couldn't be more important right now. Will you join us on the dialer? | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0ee/45c30650/1e1786470/66e1d48b/3916654514/VEsH/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/call")
---
With only 9 days until the Iowa caucuses, the conversations we have right now couldn't be more important.

**Because here 's something you need to understand:** **[The conversations you have today will have a direct impact on the results on caucus night.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0ee/45c30650/1e1786470/66e1d48c/3916654514/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMjAwMTI1LXJpbmdyaW5nLXMxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call/?utm_source=email-20200125-ringring-s1")** | **[**MAKE CALLS NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0ee/45c30650/1e1786470/66e1d48c/3916654514/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMjAwMTI1LXJpbmdyaW5nLXMxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call/?utm_source=email-20200125-ringring-s1")**
---

Making calls is an easy way to make a huge impact on the Iowa caucuses, no matter where you are or how much time you have. You can make calls from your couch, your favorite coffee shop, or even your local library _(if you 're quiet)_.

The people you speak to today could be in Elizabeth's corner on caucus night. But we need you to connect with them first and make sure they know about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change and why they should be a part of our grassroots movement.

**[Start making calls now. We wouldn't ask if it weren't important, and we can't build to win without help from supporters like you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0ee/45c30650/1e1786470/66e1d48c/3916654514/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMjAwMTI1LXJpbmdyaW5nLXMxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call/?utm_source=email-20200125-ringring-s1")**

Thanks for being in this fight with us,

Team Warren

**[**MAKE CALLS NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0ee/45c30650/1e1786470/66e1d48c/3916654514/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMjAwMTI1LXJpbmdyaW5nLXMxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call/?utm_source=email-20200125-ringring-s1")**

Will you join us on the dialer? | | | "" With only 9 days until the Iowa caucuses, the conversations we have right now couldn't be more important. Because here 's something you need to understand: "" | "" Making calls is an easy way to make a huge impact on the Iowa caucuses, no matter where you are or how much time you have. You can make calls from your couch, your favorite coffee shop, or even your local library (if you 're quiet). The people you speak to today could be in Elizabeth's corner on caucus night. But we need you to connect with them first and make sure they know about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change and why they should be a part of our grassroots movement. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: WATCH: I stand with every American who marches for LIFE.
body:
Here's my message to the pro-lifers marching this week. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d116a62911ee/calling-all-patriots-12157637?e=795c6d9796)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=983f67893b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=01eaea915c&e=795c6d9796) | [Share](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a4bbd9d2cf&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| | Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my message to the millions of Americans who marched for LIFE this week all across America. [**You can see it by clicking on the picture above.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5e479ac91d&e=795c6d9796)

If you agree that we need to send a pro-life conservative from this district to Congress in November, please click SHARE in order to make sure your friends and family see the video as well.

I've always believed that we must protect all innocent life, including unborn babies. Life begins at conception and any country that permits late-term abortions and infanticide is not just.

That's why I was so excited to see President Trump take the historic step of addressing the March for Life yesterday. He has been one of the most pro-life presidents this country has ever had. In Congress, I plan to stand strong with him as we fight to end abortion.

Kendra Horn on the other hand is fighting in Congress right now to use your tax dollars to fund abortions. That goes against less Washington--more Oklahoma, and it certainly goes against the right to life.

In Congress I will fight for every child’s right to reach their God-given potential. That's real Oklahoma values, not what Horn represents.

[**Please take a moment to watch the video and share it with your friends. We as conservatives have to make sure we stand for LIFE together in order to defeat the radical pro-abortion left.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ded324bf34&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c969f859bf&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

**P.S: [Will you help us in our campaign to oust Horn and send a pro-life conservative to D.C. to fight for Oklahoma values? $5, $10, $15, $25, or anything you can would help tremendously.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=90c8cf1883&e=795c6d9796)**
---

Here we go, folks -- The Koch network just announced their "widest election effort" EVER targeting Democratic candidates like John Hickenlooper. **The Kochs have a history of swooping in and dumping buckets of dark money to elect their favorite right-wing candidates.** They'll flood the airwaves with smears, fund extensive field programs -- whatever it takes to win this race and more. They know their favorite lapdog, Cory Gardner, is in trouble -- every major poll shows John defeating him in November. McConnell, Trump, and special interests like the Koch network will spend whatever it takes to buy this election. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Roe v. Wade just turned 47
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, It was recently the 47th anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision, but 205 GOP members of Congress hope that it is its last. They submitted a letter to the Supreme Court asking them to undo _Roe v. Wade_ and destroy bodily autonomy and the right to choose in March when the Court hears a Louisiana abortion case. This means they could overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and end legal abortion in the U.S. before the 2020 election. The Supreme Court, with Trump's hand-picked, anti-choice justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh in the lead, has already been taking steps toward dismantling these rights, rejecting a challenge to a Kentucky law requiring doctors to perform ultrasounds and play a fetal heartbeat to those seeking abortions. [**If you agree that we need to preserve access to abortion and stop Trump and the GOP 's campaign against _Roe v. Wade_ , add your name to ours and demand the Supreme Court protect our rights!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfb2/6e9863e8/8023a1e/1db050a7/3738632421/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/protect-roe-v-wade/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfb2/6e9863e8/8023a1e/1db050a7/3738632421/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/protect-roe-v-wade/wdtop/")

subject: Join U.S. mayors -- share your endorsement today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
We'd love to hear from you. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=eef1115a7e&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | This week, there was a gathering of politicians in Washington, D.C. who consistently get things done for their constituents -- the Council of U.S. Mayors. While some people in Washington are just talk, mayors have to do the day-to-day work of filling potholes and improving people's neighborhoods. They are accountable to their promises because they live in the communities they serve. As a former New York City mayor, Mike knows that better than anyone. So do many current and former mayors -- from Philadelphia to San Francisco to West Memphis, Arkansas -- who have endorsed him for president. They know he'll get it done for America just like he got it done for New York City. **Each mayor has a story about why they support Mike as our next president. But your endorsement matters just as much to us.** [**Tell us why you stand with mayors across the U.S. and support Mike as our next president!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=2682b49d9e&e=f54746ec54)

body:

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904c0/7f51f7bc/4d49b781/4ef07d8f/2622155284/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- I just wrapped up one of the first major Democratic primary debates of this campaign! I was glad for the opportunity to talk about my vision for a stronger Texas, and I was grateful to have so many of you in my corner as I took the stage.

This much is clear: ours is the best campaign to take on Senator Cornyn and defeat him in November. **I 'm asking you to help us do it by making your first* donation to this grassroots team right now.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904c0/7f51f7bc/4d49b781/4ef07d86/2622155284/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200125.2nd__813__")**
Look, you don't have to take it from me. _KVUE_ reported that we're "leading the pack in more ways than one," and _The Hill_ confirmed it!

Senator Cornyn is VULNERABLE. _The Washington Post_ even ranked his Senate seat as one of the top ten most likely to flip -- and the best way we can make that happen is to keep building up this grassroots team so we have the power to WIN in November.

name: Tina Smith
subject: One month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate. Let me explain why.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our very first monthly fundraising goal of this critical election year. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.

The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for 2020 and we're about to have one month already under our belts. I must sound like a broken record by now, but January is pretty terrible for this sort of thing -- and this is the worst possible moment to be struggling to hit a target.

With so much going on in Washington, I need to stay focused on fighting for our progressive values in the Senate and making sure Democrats don't lose this seat (and with it, virtually any chance to flip the majority).

But trying to keep Minnesota blue and doing my job to protect our health care, defend reproductive freedom, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more has left me with very little time to worry about anything else.

The good news is that my team has been keeping track of our fundraising and we're not too far behind where we need to be for our first monthly goal of the year. Whatever you're able to spare before the deadline should do the trick.

So, here comes the part where I personally ask for your help:

**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before our first monthly fundraising deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us prior to closing the books.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200125-eom4?refcode=em200125-eom4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work for the people of Minnesota. I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you in my corner, and I'm so grateful you are a part of the team.

Thank you for everything you continue to do for our campaign.

-- Tina

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4337a/c1f7015/79fd6106/11441666/3000290833/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Booker Senate HQ
subject: Let's do this for Cory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | How much do you think we can raise from this email? Hey team, Just a few days ago, we shared the news that we've raised over $100,000 in online contributions since launching Cory's re-election campaign. Because of your dedication, we're closing in on $200k! This is exciting news but we have to stay focused on hitting our ultimate goal -- which is _$350,000_. Cory will be taking a close look at the numbers over the next few days. _**We know he 'd be thrilled if we can raise $15,000 from this email alone.**_ **Do you think we can do it? If you can, pitch in a few dollars as one of our Founding Donors to help us out.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200125_BHQ_20200125-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5_v2&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

Raising $15,000 from this email in the next few hours would be a major step forward. **[If you're able to, you can chip in a few dollars right here](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200125_BHQ_20200125-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**.
It's time to keep pushing -- and blow right past this ambitious goal we've set for ourselves. As always, we'll be sure to keep you updated on our progress along the way.
Let's do this for Cory!
Booker Senate HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200125_BHQ_20200125-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc8/5fca0d19/7ad62ce6/291d37d6/3304366258/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc8/5fca0d19/7ad62ce6/291d37d5/3304366258/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc8/5fca0d19/7ad62ce6/291d37d4/3304366258/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc8/5fca0d19/7ad62ce6/291d37d3/3304366258/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").
